name: Mahmoud Guinia
description:
'''Mahmoud Guinia''' ({{langx|ar|محمود ﯕينيا}}, and rarely {{lang|ar|ﯕنيا}} or {{lang|ar|کانية}}{{Pronunciation needed}}; also spelled '''Gania''', '''Guinea''' or '''Khania'''; 1951 – 2 August 2015) was a [[Morocco|Moroccan]] [[Gnawa musician]], singer and [[sintir|guembri]] player, who was traditionally regarded as a Maâllem ({{lang|ar|معلم}}), i.e. master.

He recorded for both domestic and foreign [[recording company|labels]], and collaborated with numerous western musicians.
